infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Parking Uncle needs your location to find nearby parking spaces and show them on the map.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Parking Uncle needs your location to find nearby parking spaces even when the app is in the background.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Parking Uncle needs camera access to let you take photos of your parking space listings.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Parking Uncle needs photo library access to let you upload photos of parking spaces.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Parking Uncle to use your location to find nearby parking.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Parking Uncle to access your photos for uploading parking images.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Parking Uncle to use your camera for taking parking photos.
